name: Vrikshaml (Kokum)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: Classic treatment for digestive acidity and flatulence.
Used for weight loss and preventing fat accumulation.
Kokum butter is excellent for cracked skin and heels.
plantProfile: Deep purple fruit used in coastal Indian cooking.
preparationMethods: Juice or as a butter for topical use.
